subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the story of the tunnel adventure in depth
Analyze the sequence of events and challenges
Learn about teamwork, problem-solving, and decision-making
Develop descriptive writing and vocabulary skills
Interpret lessons and themes from the story

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Adventure and Curiosity
student_activities: Predict what might happen in the story

lesson_plan.title: Reading the Beginning
topics_covered: Initial planning and preparation for adventure
teaching_strategy: Guided reading of the first part of the story
student_activities: Read and summarize the first part
Identify characters and describe their traits

lesson_plan.title: Exploring the Tunnel
topics_covered: Planning and decision-making during the adventure
teaching_strategy: Class discussion on problem-solving and teamwork
Ask students to visualize the tunnel
student_activities: Draw the tunnel and annotate key obstacles
Explain challenges faced and solutions used by characters

lesson_plan.title: Conflict and Problem Solving
teaching_strategy: Guided discussion on decisions made by characters
student_activities: Explain the importance of teamwork in the scenario

lesson_plan.title: Climax and Lessons Learned
topics_covered: Moral and theme of the story
teaching_strategy: Ask students to analyze characters’ learning
student_activities: Write the moral of the story with reasoning
Share personal experiences of learning from challenges

lesson_plan.title: Language and Grammar Activities
teaching_strategy: Revision quiz on story events and vocabulary
student_activities: Form compound words and use them in sentences
Complete conditional sentences based on story context

teacher_tip: Encourage students to analyze the challenges in the story and discuss how teamwork, careful planning, and curiosity are balanced during adventures.
